task_desc: Wire dormant connectome pathways to user interactions or remove dead infrastructure -- Six sensory neuron types in constants.js have full connectome wiring (weights, downstream targets) but zero user-facing activation, meaning ~30% of the sensory connectome is dead code: temperature (THERMO_WARM/THERMO_COOL with mutual inhibition and connections to CX_HDELTA, LH_AV, LH_APP, drives), water (GUS_GRN_WATER to SEZ_WATER to MN_PROBOSCIS), danger odor (OLF_ORN_DANGER to LH_AV/MB_MBON_AV/DN_STARTLE/DRIVE_FEAR), bitter taste (GUS_GRN_BITTER to LH_AV/SEZ_FEED inhibition), nociception (NOCI to DN_STARTLE/DRIVE_FEAR/DN_FLIGHT), and lightDirection (declared at connectome.js:143 but never set or read). Additionally BRAIN.stimulate.dangerOdor and BRAIN.stimulate.temperature exist but nothing sets them. Wire the most impactful pathways: (1) Add a temperature control to the toolbar (a simple cycle button like light: "Temp: Warm/Cool/Neutral") that sets BRAIN.stimulate.temperature to 0.75/0.25/0.5; the existing connectome.js temperature processing at lines 339-347 already handles these values correctly so only the UI button, toolbar wiring, and initial state need to be added; warm should make the fly more active and avoidant, cool should make it exploratory and approach-seeking per the THERMO_WARM/COOL weights, (2) Wire nociception to repeated rapid touches: if the user touches the fly 3+ times within 4 seconds (track touch timestamps in an array), trigger BRAIN.stimulate.nociception = true for one brain tick, activating the NOCI pathway (DN_STARTLE weight 10, DRIVE_FEAR weight 8, DN_FLIGHT weight 6) for an intense escape response distinct from single-touch startle; add nociception stimulus processing in the sensory block of connectome.js BRAIN.update, (3) Remove lightDirection property from BRAIN.stimulate since directional light is not implemented (phototaxis uses canvas center) and the field is misleading dead state, (4) Leave GUS_GRN_WATER, GUS_GRN_BITTER, and OLF_ORN_DANGER in the connectome weights as dormant infrastructure for future expansion but add a code comment noting they are not yet wired to user interactions. Files: js/main.js, js/connectome.js, index.html, css/main.css.
